commands.review_summary:
The branch narrows Telegram thread-not-found fallback to General/no-thread routes, keeps explicit forum and DM topic sends fail-closed, and persists Telegram cron/heartbeat topic route metadata with regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main’s source-visible fallback retries explicit forum sends without `message_thread_id`, and the PR discussion includes base-failing/head-passing test proof; I did not run a live Telegram probe in this read-only review.
